raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Poetic self-affirmation of emotional-intellectual balance, modeling an integrated stance toward feeling and reason.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Love/joy and discernment can stably coexist without mutual interference.",
    "Openness is a non-coercive alternative to forced positivity.",
    "Warmth and clarity are compatible rather than opposing states.",
    "Connection can be chosen without compromising truth.",
    "Authentic joy arises from internal coherence rather than external performance."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent; each line reinforces the same theme of non-dual integration without internal contradiction.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Reader seeks reflective language for personal integration of affect and cognition; context treats the lines as aspirational or evocative rather than prescriptive.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Reader interprets the statements as empirical psychological claims or actionable instructions whose validity is assumed without further evidence or situational specificity."
}
